description: Sample relative displacement or force from a single degree-of-freedom in a structural element link.

keywords.name: displacement-x
keywords.description: Set the relative displacement in the local \(x\) degree-of-freedom.

keywords.name: displacement-y
keywords.description: Set the relative displacement in the local \(y\) degree-of-freedom.

keywords.name: displacement-z
keywords.description: Set the relative displacement in the local \(z\) degree-of-freedom.

keywords.name: displacement-rotational-x
keywords.description: Set the relative angular displacement in the local \(x\) degree-of-freedom.

keywords.name: displacement-rotational-y
keywords.description: Set the relative angular displacement in the local \(y\) degree-of-freedom.

keywords.name: displacement-rotational-z
keywords.description: Set the relative angular displacement in the local \(z\) degree-of-freedom.

keywords.name: force-x
keywords.description: Set the force in the local \(x\) degree-of-freedom.

keywords.name: force-y
keywords.description: Set the force in the local \(y\) degree-of-freedom.

keywords.name: force-z
keywords.description: Set the force in the local \(z\) degree-of-freedom.

keywords.name: moment-x
keywords.description: Set the moment in the local \(x\) degree-of-freedom.

keywords.name: moment-y
keywords.description: Set the moment in the local \(y\) degree-of-freedom.

keywords.name: moment-z
keywords.description: Set the moment in the local \(z\) degree-of-freedom.

keywords.name: component-id
keywords.description: The particular link is identified by the component ID number. If this keyword is used position should not be used.

keywords.name: position
keywords.description: The particular link is identified by ( v ) coordinates (the nearest node is taken). If this keyword is used, component-id should not be used.

keywords.name: side
keywords.description: Specify which side of the node indicated in position should be used to find the link. By default, side 1 is used.
